title: The Truth of the Void Century Spreads
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Vegapunk as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We can deal with the Ramifications later!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quickly!! Eradicate the broadcast snail... NO-- snuff out every living thing you can sense!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn Vegapunk! Did he really spill the beans on everything?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please humor me for a moment as I make a prediction...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Assuming my sensor data is accurate,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A few days from now as I record this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...an exceptionally vicious earthquake will rock the entire planet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me he's talking about today's earthquake?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: didn't he die after this recording!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Following this calamity,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sea levels the world over will rise by one meter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A number of islands will become uninhabitable...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No way!!! He actually saw it coming?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And naturally, many beaches will also be completely submerged.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If this doesn't come to pass,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Feel free to disregard the rest of this message.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is freaky! How was he able to call it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Assuming, however, these events have transpired...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then please pay heed to what I have to say!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The earthquake I just predicted cannot strictly speaking...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ryan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...be considered a natural phenomenon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Vegapunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Not another word!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Get out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've always naively yearned for peace and prosperity...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GNNG!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: JWAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: YOHO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GWAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Begone!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
